title: T-046 — UI parity: dashboard, WO list/detail and Start WO release blockers
prompt:
# T-046 — UI parity: dashboard, WO list/detail and Start WO release blockers

PRD/UX refs: SCR-08-01, SCR-08-02, MODAL-08-02, prototype labels production_dashboard,line_card,wo_list,wo_detail,start_wo_modal

Goal: Build Production dashboard, line cards, WO list/detail shell, and Start WO modal with canonical release-readiness blocker UI.

Implementation details:
Use Next.js App Router Server Components by default, shadcn/ui components, next-intl keys, org-scoped data access, loading/empty/error states, and literal data-prototype-label markers matching _meta/prototype-labels/prototype-index-production.json. Closeout must include desktop screenshots and Playwright traces. Dashboard/list/detail must match prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/production/dashboard.jsx:3-229 and wo-detail.jsx:3-87 plus modals.jsx:48-67. Start modal shows release_status, active_bom_header_id, active_factory_spec_id and blockers from T-001/T-016; disabled blocked rows deep-link to Planning. Remove any visible Production Release WO action.

Scope files:
- apps/web/app/production/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/production/wos/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/production/wos/[id]/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/components/production/start-wo-modal.tsx [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/production/dashboard.jsx:3-229
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/production/wo-detail.jsx:3-87
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/production/modals.jsx:48-67

Acceptance criteria:
1. Dashboard/list/detail render with data-prototype-label markers and match prototype layout
2. Blocked release rows disable Start and show typed blockers plus Planning deep-link
3. Closeout includes screenshots for dashboard, WO detail, and blocked Start modal plus Playwright trace

Evidence: include screenshots/artifacts and Playwright traces/artifacts for UI/E2E tasks; include API test output for backend tasks.

test_strategy: RED: add failing unit/integration tests for the cited slice before implementation
GREEN: run targeted pnpm test command and relevant Playwright check
risk_red_lines: Do not treat D365 sync/export/Built as production release source-of-truth
Do not bypass 04-PLANNING WO snapshot or 03-TECHNICAL active factory spec/BOM approval

cross_module_dependencies.reason: Technical BOM/factory_spec approval emits factory-use state.
Planning snapshots active_bom_header_id and active_factory_spec_id onto WOs.

pipeline_inputs.priority_normalization_note: Priority normalized to ACP convention bands on 2026-05-03; lower number means earlier execution.
